title: Implement raw HTTP Vault KV v2 PUT without vaultrs
description: Replace vaultrs::kv2::set with a raw reqwest call to POST /v1/<mount>/data/<path> with body {"data": ...}. For ?field= case: body is {"data":{field:value}}. For no-?field= case: body is {"data": <caller-supplied JSON object>}. Body bytes can be assembled without serde_json if values are already valid strings. Depends on C2 for the reqwest client setup pattern.
